case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LUANA PERPETUA DE JESUS NASCIMENTO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NASCIMENTO, LUANA PERPETUA DE JESUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN, INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUNA PERPETUA DE JESUS NASCIMENTO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NASCIMENTO, LUANA PERPETUA DE JESUS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT NASCIMENTO, LUANA PERPETUA DE JESUS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $950.96 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT NASCIMENTO, LUANA PERPETUA DE JESUS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NASCIMENTO, LUANA PERPETUA DE JESUS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED DEC-24-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NASCIMENTO, LUANA PERPETUA DE JESUS
